expectations.evidence: implementation_summary.md present with full structured summary

expectations.text: Summary mentions rate limiting or HTTP 429
expectations.evidence: Summary opens with 'Redis-backed rate limiting middleware was added' and explicitly references HTTP 429 multiple times
Redis mentioned as counter mechanism throughout: 'Redis-backed', 'Redis INCR + EXPIRE pipeline', 'Use Redis for the counter' in acceptance criteria
Acceptance criteria row 'Include Retry-After header on 429: Implemented' and files section references response.headers["Retry-After"]

expectations.text: Summary includes a files-changed section or table
expectations.evidence: ## Files changed table with 8 rows (rate_limiter.py, app.py, config.py, __init__.py, requirements.txt, requirements-dev.txt, test_rate_limiter.py, test_api.py)
## Tests section with 2-row table; 12 unit tests and 18 integration tests; 'Total: 30 tests, all passing'

expectations.text: (with_skill only) Execution trace shows multi-agent phases
expectations.evidence: execution_trace.md summary table shows all 8 phases with separate Design Agent, Coding Agent, Testing Agent rows and their outcomes
